content.en:
Fog area, inner area.

Ye Tian was not too arrogant here, he had always opened the Life Heavenly Pupil, and he definitely did not approach those beings with terrifying breaths.

Because under the exploration of the Life Heavenly Pupil, the internal area also has some existences that he can't compete with for the time being, which is definitely equivalent to the strength of a second-class supreme.

Of course, such misty beasts are rare and rare, and unless they are unlucky, people will not encounter them.

Ye Tian knew where they were, so he wouldn't go looking for death.

After all, the speed of a second-rank supreme level misty beast could be incomparably against the sky, even surpassing the speed of a first-class supreme in the universe, and even surpassing Ye Tian's constant light supernatural speed.

Ye Tian had been looking for elixir in the inner area, and did not immediately go to the core area.

If he could find enough elixirs suitable for himself in the inner area, there would be no need for him to venture into the core area for the time being.

After all, even the First Divine Lord of the Protoss almost fell in the core area, which must be extremely dangerous.

Time passed little by little, and nine years passed in a blink of an eye.

In the past nine years, he has visited many places in the inner area, but he still has not visited the entire inner area.

With the ability of the Life Heavenly Pupil, he almost didn't encounter any danger, and he also found several treasures similar to the original valley, killing more than hundreds of Tianzun-level mist beasts, and more than ten supreme-level misty beasts.

Ten supremes, hundreds of heavenly supremes, such a force even surpassed the human race, but because of the lack of supremes, it was impossible to form a civilization, and Ye Tian alone bombarded them.

I have to say that the misty beast without a civilization foundation, no matter how strong it is, it is a plate of scattered sand.

After nine years of searching, Ye Tian had already scraped together enough elixirs, and there were more than a dozen elixirs similar to the Nine Colored Heavenly Crystal Grass that could improve cultivation talents, which was enough for the human race to give birth to more than a dozen new supremes.

"There are too many treasures in the misty area, but it's a pity that the other supremes don't dare to step into the inner area casually, otherwise if I look for it so unscrupulously, I don't know how many times I will die!"

Ye Tian muttered.

There was only less than a year left before the disappearance of the Misty Zone, and he didn't dare to bet that he would survive in the Misty Zone, and it was more likely that he would disappear like the previous people.

"Time is running out, I have to return in half a year at most!"

Ye Tian decided.

He wasn't going to continue looking in the inner area, but was going to get closer to the core.

He has the Heavenly Pupil of Life, which can detect the existence of the breath of life, so if he detects the terrifying Mist Beast, he can leave immediately.

"Just take a look!"

Ye Tiandao.

Swish!

He flew towards the heart of the Mist Zone.

It didn't take long for him to see a canopy, and it was this canopy that hindered the exploration of the Life Heavenly Pupil, otherwise with the scope of his exploration, he would have already detected the situation in the core area.

"Try it with your consciousness avatar first!"

Ye Tian thought.

Wow!

The consciousness avatar appeared, passed through the canopy, and entered the core area.

No danger!

Ye Tian's true body immediately entered the core area, and the moment he entered the core area, he opened the Life Heavenly Pupil ability.

Rumble!!!!

A terrifying breath of life penetrated the heavens and the earth, taking Ye Tian by surprise.

"All of them are sixth-order lifeforms, and the weakest ones are all Supreme!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply.

These are all real sixth-order lifeforms, not pseudo-sixth-order, judging by their life breath, those misty beasts at the edge of the core area should be second-order supremes, and those misty beasts at the very core are probably already first-order supremes.

The most terrifying thing is the extreme distance detected by the Life Heavenly Pupil, where the life breath of several misty beasts has reached the seventh order of life, and the life intensity even exceeds that of the first-class supreme, even if the Lord of the Yuan Gu competes with it, I am afraid it is far inferior.

"I didn't expect the core area to be so terrifying!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Suddenly.

Streams of aura came across the space, and it seemed that Ye Tian had been discovered.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian instantly passed through the canopy of heaven and returned to the inner area, and then used his constant light magic power to fly outside at great speed.

It seems that those terrible mist beasts can't get out, so they don't chase them.

But Ye Tian was no longer ready to explore the secrets of the core area of the misty region, that was not what he could explore now.

At this moment, Ye Tiancai truly realized how many secrets of the universe were.

"The Misty Region, the Destruction Abyss, and the Origin Realm, these are just three of them, and any one place is not something that the ten thousand races in the main space of the universe can compete with!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, Ye Tian came out of the misty area.

Glancing back at the misty area, he felt that the misty area was like a huge gluttony, devouring countless lives.

"Let's come back later!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Terran, Holy City.

Ye Tian is back.

When he came back this time, he immediately convened the Supreme Council.

Although he is only now in the realm, he has been regarded as a new supreme by the supremes of the human race, so he has the authority to convene the supreme meeting.

Mixed Yuan Supreme, Kunwu Supreme, Divine Blade Supreme, Wuji Supreme......

This time, a total of thirteen Supremes came, and some of them were in retreat, or other things were delayed, so not all of them came.

"Master of Ten Thousand Laws, I don't know what is the so-called matter of opening the meeting this time?"

Divine Blade Supreme asked.

"Guys, I went to the Misty Zone not long ago!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Misty Zone!"

As soon as they heard this name, many Supremes' expressions changed, this is a very dangerous place!

Some of them even almost fell there at the beginning, and now few supremes dare to go to the misty area.

Ye Tian continued: "In the misty area, I found fifteen elixirs that could transform a Phase-level cultivation talent into a mixed-level cultivation talent, as well as a large number of elixirs that could raise a Universe-level cultivation talent to a Phase-level cultivation talent. Of course, there are also a lot of elixirs that can allow the Supremes to refine their bodies and souls, I wonder if you are interested?"

"What, really?"

Even the Mixed Yuan Supreme looked very excited.

"Of course it's true!"

Ye Tian grabbed it casually, took out a batch of elixirs from the small universe in his body, and placed them in front of many supremes one by one.

He is not afraid of the supremes snatching, everyone is a human race, and with so many supremes present, whoever dares to rob it will be a shame and will offend all the supremes.

"Ahem, my Wuji Sword Sect has three ancient masters, and they have accumulated to the extreme, once they break through to the realm of Tianzun, they will be sure to impact the supreme-level combat power in a short time, and there will be three more supremes for our human race, so I want three elixirs that can be promoted to mixed-level cultivation talent!"

"We also need a few elixirs that have been upgraded to the mixed level cultivation talent in our Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain!"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme also spoke.

One Supreme One by one, they were all very eager to get such an elixir.
